_note: SYNTHETIC photometric intent payload built solely to satisfy the D.2 lighting-layout cascade source path. There is no companion electrical/photometric-analysis/examples/cascade-uk-bathroom-zone-1-zone-2/ folder yet — the photometric skill has not been retrofitted to consume Part-7 bathroom lighting layouts in the v1.0 sprint. This file exists so the consumed_intents.photometric_grid.source_path in output.json points to a real, schema-valid payload. When the photometric skill ships its Part-7 retrofit, replace this file with a real cascade-* example reference. INV-11 sub-checks 3 + 4 reference the numbers in this payload; numbers are engineered to be consistent with the 2-luminaire 1500lm IPx4 layout (lumen-method gives ~254 lux on the 5.67 m² floor area with UF=0.6 / MF=0.8).
